mapper.sql: id, year, month, org_unit, emission_source, emission_type, data_method, unit, activity_value, emission_factor, factor_source, emission_amount, is_estimated, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark
mapper.select: SELECT emission_source, emission_type, unit, factor_source, SUM(activity_value) AS activity_value, AVG(emission_factor) AS emission_factor, SUM(emission_amount) AS emission_amount FROM ems_carbon_verification_activity WHERE year = #{year} AND org_unit = #{orgUnit} GROUP BY emission_source, emission_type, unit, factor_source ORDER BY emission_source

SELECT emission_source, emission_type, MAX(data_method) AS data_method, MAX(unit) AS unit, SUM(activity_value) AS annual_activity_value, AVG(emission_factor) AS emission_factor, MAX(factor_source) AS factor_source, SUM(emission_amount) AS annual_emission_amount, MAX(CASE WHEN month = 1 THEN activity_value END) AS month1_value, MAX(CASE WHEN month = 1 THEN emission_factor END) AS month1_factor, MAX(CASE WHEN month = 2 THEN activity_value END) AS month2_value FROM ems_carbon_verification_activity WHERE year = #{year} AND org_unit = #{orgUnit} GROUP BY emission_source, emission_type ORDER BY emission_source
